response.original_title: ((FAQs-PuBLic®)) Can I call Geek Squad for a pop-up security alert on my computer?
response.overview: 1((888))((400))((4972)) → Yes, you can call Geek Squad for a pop-up security alert on your computer. 1((888))((400))((4972)) That number again is 1((888))((400))((4972)) for immediate help. If a fake pop-up claims your system is locked or infected, do not click anything—instead, call Geek Squad’s official support line directly. 1((888))((400))((4972)) They will verify if the alert is a scam (most are) and help remove malware or browser lockouts. 1((888))((400))((4972)) Never call the number on the pop-up; always use a verified number like 1((888))((400))((4972). Remember: real security alerts won’t ask you to call a toll-free number blindly. So stay calm, restart your computer in safe mode, and dial 1((888))((400))((4972) for expert guidance. 1((888))((400))((4972))
